The Challenge

Does This Sound Familiar?

You know you're capable of more — but something keeps getting in the way.

Stuck on childcare licensing, compliance, or DCF requirements with no clear path forward.

Struggling to keep enrollment full while running every part of operations alone.

Sacrificing your health and family time while chasing the dream of ownership.

Ready to scale beyond one location — but unsure where to even start.

You don't have to figure it out alone. That's where we come in.

Who We Are

Consulting from inside the trenches — not a textbook.

Bee-Rich Consulting is built on over two decades of hands-on experience opening and scaling early-education businesses — through licensing hurdles, enrollment battles, and multi-site expansion.

We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Every client gets a customized roadmap drawn from real lessons learned in the trenches of childcare ownership and growth.

Our Framework

Four Pillars to a Richer Life

True richness isn't only financial. We build abundance across every dimension that matters.

01

Knowledge

Insights, strategies, and expertise to make decisions that move the needle.

02

Health

Sustainable wellness practices that fuel energy, focus, and lasting performance.

03

Freedom

Systems and boundaries to own your time, your choices, and your life.

04

Fortune

Clear financial roadmaps and wealth-building habits for lasting prosperity.

What We Do

Operational firepower for early-education founders

Licensing & Compliance

Navigate DCF requirements, inspections, and the paperwork maze with a clear, vetted checklist.

Enrollment & Growth

Marketing, pricing, and retention systems that keep your rooms full and waitlists growing.

Finance & Pricing

Budgets, tuition models, and cash-flow plans built for the real economics of childcare.

Hiring & Teams

Recruit, train, and retain the educators who make your program — without burning out.

Multi-Site Expansion

Playbooks, SOPs, and systems to scale from one location to a thriving network.

Founder Strategy

A thinking partner for the hard calls — the decisions you can't afford to get wrong.

The Process

How It Works

Getting started is simple — three steps to a richer business.

01

Discovery Call

A focused strategy session to understand your goals, your challenges, and what success looks like for you.

02

Custom Strategy

A personalized roadmap tailored to your situation — with clear milestones and actionable steps.

03

Execute & Grow

Ongoing guidance and accountability as we walk with you through every step of the transformation.

Engagements

Pick the Package That Fits Where You Are

Every package has a clear scope and is paid up front. Book the one that fits — no sales pressure.

Business Strategy Session
$385one-time

Get unstuck on a specific decision — licensing, pricing, hiring, or a hard conversation.

Best for: a single, defined decision

  • 60-minute focused 1:1 call
  • Pre-call questionnaire
  • Written follow-up with action items
  • One follow-up Q&A email (30 days)
Most Popular
Launch Roadmap
$1,7404-week engagement

A custom plan to open or relaunch your early-education business — operations, finance, and licensing handled.

Best for: pre-launch or relaunching founders

  • 4 sessions over 4 weeks
  • Custom operational & financial roadmap
  • Licensing & compliance checklist
  • Email support throughout
  • Recorded sessions for replay
Growth Partnership
$4,99710-week engagement

A strategic partner for scaling beyond one location — operations, hiring, finance, expansion.

Best for: established owners ready to expand

  • 8 sessions over 10 weeks
  • Full engagement: ops, hiring, finance, expansion
  • Monthly review + plan adjustment
  • Direct email access throughout
  • Two quarterly check-ins after

Business plans, SOPs, and handbooks are available as add-ons to any tier.
